{{#if isList}}
import { {{listComponentName}} } from "@/features/{{feature}}/components/{{listComponentImport}}";
{{#each listActions}}
import { {{importName}} } from "@/features/{{../feature}}/actions/{{importPath}}";
{{/each}}

type {{resourceName}}ListPageProps = {
  searchParams?: Promise<Record<string, string | undefined>>;
};

export default async function {{resourceName}}ListPage({
  searchParams,
}: {{resourceName}}ListPageProps) {
  const params = searchParams ? await searchParams : {};

  {{#if listActions.length}}
  const data = await Promise.all([
    {{#each listActions}}
    {{callExpression}},
    {{/each}}
  ]);
  {{#each listActions}}
  const {{resultKey}} = data[{{@index}}];
  {{/each}}
  {{/if}}

  return (
    <{{listComponentName}}
      {{#each listActions}}
      {{resultKey}}={{{resultKey}}}
      {{/each}}
      searchParams={params}
    />
  );
}
{{/if}}

{{#if isEdit}}
import { {{getByIdActionName}} } from "@/features/{{feature}}/actions/{{getByIdActionImport}}";
import { {{editComponentName}} } from "@/features/{{feature}}/components/{{editComponentImport}}";

interface {{resourceName}}EditPageProps {
  params: Promise<{ {{idParam}}: string }>;
}

export default async function Edit{{resourceName}}Page({ params }: {{resourceName}}EditPageProps) {
  const { {{idParam}} } = await params;
  const data = await {{getByIdActionName}}({{idParam}});

  if (!data) {
    return (
      <div className="flex min-h-[50vh] items-center justify-center font-medium text-muted-foreground">
        No se encontro el recurso.
      </div>
    );
  }

  return <{{editComponentName}} initialData={data} />;
}
{{/if}}

{{#if isNew}}
import {{newComponentName}} from "@/features/{{feature}}/components/{{newComponentImport}}";

export default function New{{resourceName}}Page() {
  return <{{newComponentName}} />;
}
{{/if}}
